classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为动力线功能与颜色对应表，列出'U相 MOTOR U'、'V相 MOTOR V'、'W相 MOTOR W'及对应线色和线径'BROWN(18AWG)'、'PURPLE(18AWG)'、'BLUE (18AWG)'，体现电机三相动力线的接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机端面外形图，包含动力线引出位置、线长标注'L≥300'、底部直径尺寸'Ø34'以及线缆处理说明'不套UVW标识管'，未给出针脚编号与功能对应关系，因此归入机械尺寸类。

Removed extraneous trailing ')' from OCR; ocr_005 is an overlapping partial duplicate and is not reused.

terminology_notes: Wire treatment callout interpreted as strip length 5 mm and tinning.
translation_notes: Visible English callouts were preserved and normalized into Chinese engineering descriptions.

dimension_records.reason: Leader line points to the power wires; the callout specifies wire end stripping and tinning.
Dimension-style callout near the power wire indicates minimum lead length.
Text is enclosed in a circular label near the power wire callout; it is an interface/label marking rather than a dimensional value.
Text is enclosed in a circular label near the power wire callout; it is an interface/label marking rather than a dimensional value.
Leader line points to the three outgoing wires and the text identifies the UVW phase wires.
Diameter symbol and dimension line across the circular part indicate an outside/envelope diameter.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机'Tecnical Data'参数表，列出'Rated Torque T_N (N.m)'、'Maximum torque T_m (N.m)'、'Rated Speed n_N (rpm)'、电流、功率和时间常数等性能数据；虽不是曲线图，但工程含义主要对应电机扭矩、转速及性能参数，较给定类别中最接近扭矩-转速性能类。

labels.translation_en_full: 0±0.1 mm (distance between stator and rotor core faces)

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图中对应绿色框内的剖面结构图，包含剖面线、中心线、引出说明和多处尺寸标注，如'φ58.5(Max)'、'φ40.5(Min)'、'13.5(Max)'、'0±0.1(定转子铁芯面间距)'，表达电机定转子铁芯及磁钢相关的几何尺寸和装配间距。

classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图左下方，标题为'Performance Curve'，包含扭矩纵轴'T(N.m)'、转速横轴'n(rpm)'、连续区'Continuous'和间歇区'Intermittent'，并标注0.45、0.55、1.25、3100、3400等扭矩与转速关键值，属于电机扭矩-转速性能曲线。

dimension_records.reason: Top-center title identifies the graph as a performance curve.
Vertical axis label indicates torque scale.
Horizontal axis label indicates rotational speed scale.
Left-side numeric labels form the torque axis scale.
Bottom numeric labels form the speed axis scale.
Text label inside upper graph region identifies the intermittent operating area.
Text label inside lower graph region identifies the continuous operating area.
Numeric label is placed on the continuous torque curve.
Numeric label is adjacent to the sloped curve transition.
Numbers are placed near vertical markers and curve endpoints, indicating characteristic speed points.

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This region is a performance curve, not a mechanical dimension view. Mechanical dimensions are not visible in the target crop.

regions.content:
技术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T7345-2008要求:
对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
regions.content_en: Technical requirements: Stator lead wires shall comply with GB/T7345-2008 requirements: For stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pull force of 9N. After the test, the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation and core shall not be damaged.

ocr.text:
技术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T7345-2008要求:
对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。

items.text: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。

labels.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
labels.translation_en_simple: Each lead wire of stator three-phase must withstand 9N pull
labels.translation_en_full: For the stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pulling force of 9 N,

labels.label_text_original: 试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
labels.translation_en_simple: After test, no breakage, no damage to insulation or core
labels.translation_en_full: After the test, the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation and conductor shall not be damaged.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为图纸中的'技术要求'文字说明，内容要求定子三相引出线按GB/T7345-2008承受9N拉力且线芯和绝缘层不得损坏，属于电机引出线的机械可靠性和结构要求；未出现针脚编号与功能对应或反馈信号定义，因此最接近机械尺寸类图纸信息。

records.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
records.translation_en_simple: Each lead wire of stator three-phase must withstand 9N pull
records.translation_en_full: For the stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pulling force of 9 N,

records.label_text_original: 试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
records.translation_en_simple: After test, no breakage, no damage to insulation or core
records.translation_en_full: After the test, the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation and conductor shall not be damaged.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
